overall.description: First-person exploration of a dystopian futuristic commercial district in a video game. The player walks along cracked asphalt roads past abandoned vehicles and ruined modern architecture, entering a plaza with a crashed aircraft and scattered debris under a clear blue sky with distant smoke plumes.

tall palm trees lining the left side of the road
weathered asphalt surface with cracks and patches of sand
low concrete dividers along the right edge of the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert road with cracked asphalt stretching toward a futuristic commercial district. Palm trees line the left side while concrete barriers edge the right. The camera moves steadily forward under a clear blue sky with distant smoke plumes, approaching modern glass buildings and construction cranes.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance to AKEBON building with neon signage and abandoned vehicles

events.description: approaching the AKEBON building entrance with large green neon signage
slowing slightly to navigate around the abandoned red car near the entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the AKEBON building entrance, moving past an abandoned red car and observing the neon signage

notable_agents.action: scavenger standing near the AKEBON entrance observing the area

entered.detail: large green neon sign spelling 'AKEBON' mounted on the building facade
rusted red sedan with open doors and missing wheels parked near the entrance
metal scaffolding structure with orange safety rails along the building side
large covered archway entrance with red structural elements visible inside

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the AKEBON building entrance, transitioning from open road to a semi-covered plaza area. A large green neon sign dominates the view while an abandoned red car sits near the entrance. The ground changes to tiled pavement with graffiti, and a scavenger NPC stands near the archway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitioning from AKEBON entrance back to open plaza

events.description: exiting the covered AKEBON entrance area back into open plaza space
turning right to face the open plaza with crashed aircraft visible in distance

agents.ego_description: turning away from the AKEBON entrance and heading back toward the open plaza area

entered.detail: large wrecked aircraft or spacecraft with blue and white fuselage visible in the plaza distance

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the AKEBON entrance area and turns right, revealing a wide open plaza. The AKEBON sign and red car fall behind as the view opens up to show a massive crashed aircraft in the distance. The ground remains tiled concrete with scattered debris and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with abandoned military vehicles and aircraft wreckage

events.description: approaching a scavenger NPC who is bending over searching through debris
passing by the scavenger and continuing toward the crashed aircraft wreckage

agents.ego_description: walking through the debris-filled plaza, observing abandoned vehicles and approaching a scavenging NPC

notable_agents.action: scavenger bending over and searching through debris piles on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large blue and white cylindrical storage tanks lined up near the aircraft wreckage
armored military truck with camouflage paint parked on the left side of the plaza
orange metal scaffolding structure along the right side building

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a wide open plaza filled with abandoned military vehicles and debris. A scavenger NPC is seen bending over searching through trash near the sidewalk. In the distance, large blue cylindrical tanks and the massive crashed aircraft wreckage dominate the view, with orange scaffolding visible along the right side buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza approach to aircraft wreckage with industrial debris

events.description: passing the scavenger NPC and approaching the large aircraft wreckage
approaching painted 'ONE WAY' signage on the ground near concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza past the scavenger, approaching the crashed aircraft and industrial tanks

notable_agents.action: scavenger sitting on a bench or crate near the right sidewalk

entered.detail: red painted letters spelling 'ONE WAY' on the cracked asphalt surface
scattered rubble and abandoned materials covering the plaza ground

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving deeper into the plaza, passing the scavenger NPC who is now sitting near the right sidewalk. The crashed aircraft wreckage and blue cylindrical tanks grow larger in the frame. The camera approaches a 'ONE WAY' sign painted on the ground near concrete barriers, with the futuristic building complex visible again in the left background and dark smoke rising in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a desolate desert highway into the heart of a ruined futuristic commercial plaza. It begins on a wide stretch of cracked asphalt lined with palm trees and concrete barriers, moving steadily toward a skyline of glass buildings and distant smoke plumes. As the camera reaches the AKEBON building, the open road transitions into a semi-covered entrance marked by a glowing green neon sign, an abandoned red car, and graffiti-covered tiles. The view then expands as the camera turns right, leaving the entrance behind to reveal a vast open plaza filled with scattered debris, abandoned military vehicles, and a scavenger searching through trash. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the square, passing the scavenger to approach a massive crashed aircraft and blue cylindrical tanks that dominate the horizon beneath a clear sky.
